title: Where can I find the final chapters of the manga translated
display_title: Where can I find the final chapters of the manga translated
wikitext:
[]: Where can I find the final chapters of the manga, translated Post by Spifcakes » Sat Jun 15, 2013 6:15 pm I know that people have read them because I've seen discussions on various english forums, but haven't been able to find them myself. I'm trying to stay away from spoilers but the longer it takes, the harder it is to restrain myself x) Sorry if this is posted in the wrong subforum.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jun 15, 2013 6:31 pm Answer: the internets. wrote: A. Copyrighted Media Do not ask for, or provide links to, sites illegally hosting copyrighted media. If you want to download the entire show, its soundtracks, and scans of the entire manga, fine -- but do it without involving the forum.
